trivia_bullets.text: Aetherdrift (set code DFT) released February 14, 2025, is the 103rd Magic expansion and the first major set of 2025. The set stages an interplanar death race — the Ghirapur Grand Prix — across three planes: Avishkar (formerly Kaladesh), Amonkhet, and Muraganda. [Wizards: Planeswalker's Guide to Aetherdrift Part 1; Scryfall]

"Guidelight" is the name of one of the ten racing teams in the Grand Prix: the Guidelight Voyagers, an uncanny fleet of automatons captained by a single hive-mind entity called "Mendicant Core." The Voyagers first appeared on Avishkar through an Omenpath that opened around them during the post-Phyrexian-invasion period, and they joined the race hoping to recreate the transit conditions that might return them to their homeworld. They are not a manufacturer or in-world brand — the name is a proper team designation. [Wizards: Planeswalker's Guide to Aetherdrift Part 1]

Flavor text (Scryfall): "Analysis: Systems operating at 125% efficiency. Stress within expected tolerances. Exclamatory: Punch it." — the robotic speech pattern (categorized internal states before utterances: "Analysis:", "Exclamatory:") is consistent with Mendicant Core's hive-mind automaton framing in set lore. [Scryfall]

Mechanically, Guidelight Optimizer is an Artifact Creature — Robot (type_line confirmed Scryfall) that taps for {U} restricted to artifact spells or activated abilities — a Springleaf Drum variant for artifact-heavy blue builds. It is legal in Pauper and Pauper Commander as a common, making it a potential role-player in artifact-synergy shells at those budget tiers. [Scryfall legalities]

Guidelight Matrix (DFT no. 233, artist Eli Minaya) is the second card to carry the Guidelight team name in the set. Matrix is a colorless artifact with a draw-on-entry trigger plus two activated abilities that spur Mounts and Vehicles — mechanically complementary to Optimizer's mana production. Neither card has a flavor text; both are commons, suggesting the Guidelight Voyagers were primarily rendered at the common slot in the set's faction distribution. [Scryfall DFT/233]

related_cards.name: Guidelight Matrix
related_cards.note: Second card in the Guidelight Voyagers faction; same team, complementary mechanics (draw + Vehicle/Mount animation vs. mana production)

related_cards.name: Guidelight Pathmaker
related_cards.note: Third card explicitly carrying the Guidelight name; part of the same automaton racing team

related_cards.name: Springleaf Drum
related_cards.note: Mechanical predecessor — taps creatures for restricted colored mana in artifact decks
